fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the reminder setup

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the reminder setup

fields.name: Send by Email
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to send reminders by email

fields.name: Use Document Sending Profile
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to use a document sending profile when sending reminders by email

fields.name: Log Interaction
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to log an interaction when a reminder is sent

fields.name: Show Amounts Not Due
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to show amounts that are not due on the reminder

fields.name: Show Multiple Interest Rates
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to show multiple interest rates on the reminder

fields.name: Attach Invoice Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to attach all invoice documents to the reminder email

fields.name: Send Multiple Times Per Level
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to send multiple reminders to the same customer

fields.name: Minimum Time Between Sending
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum number of days between sending reminder to the same customer
